ddls:
CREATE TABLE "policyholders" (
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policyholder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the policyholder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the policyholder */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the policyholder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the policyholder */,
  "policyholder_type" TEXT /* Type of policyholder (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the policyholder */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the policyholder */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the policyholder */,
  "driving_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of driving experience */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the policyholder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the policyholder record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the policyholder record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policyholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder who owns the policy */,
  "policy_state" TEXT /* State where the policy is issued */,
  "policy_deductable" REAL /* Deductible amount for the policy */,
  "policy_liability" REAL /* Liability coverage amount for the policy */,
  "policy_annual_premium" REAL /* Annual premium for the policy */,
  "policy_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "policy_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, expired, cancelled) */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., comprehensive, collision) */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the policy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the policy record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the policy record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_policyholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("policyholder_id") REFERENCES policyholders ("policyholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the claim */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., collision, theft, break-in) */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Location of the incident */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Total amount claimed */,
  "claim_payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was paid */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the claim */,
  "adjuster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adjuster handling the claim */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the claim record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the claim record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_adjuster_id FOREIGN KEY ("adjuster_id") REFERENCES adjusters ("adjuster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim associated with the incident */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident */,
  "num_witnesses" INTEGER /* Number of witnesses */,
  "num_injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries */,
  "authorities_contacted" TEXT /* Authorities contacted (e.g., police, ambulance) */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the incident */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions during the incident */,
  "lighting_conditions" TEXT /* Lighting conditions during the incident */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the incident record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the incident record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim associated with the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "vehicle_color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_ownership" TEXT /* Ownership status (e.g., leased, owned) */,
  "vehicle_mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle at the time of the incident */,
  "vehicle_inspection_report" TEXT /* Reference to the vehicle inspection report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the vehicle record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the vehicle record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claimants" (
  "claimant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claimant */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim associated with the claimant */,
  "claimant_name" TEXT /* Name of the claimant */,
  "claimant_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the claimant to the policyholder (e.g., self, spouse, child) */,
  "claimant_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the claimant */,
  "claimant_address" TEXT /* Address of the claimant */,
  "claimant_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the claimant */,
  "claimant_email" TEXT /* Email address of the claimant */,
  "claimant_insurance_company" TEXT /* Name of the claimant's insurance company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the claimant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the claimant record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claimant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claimants_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjusters" (
  "adjuster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjuster */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the adjuster */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the adjuster */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the adjuster */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the adjuster */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the adjuster record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the adjuster record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjuster_id")
)
